_comment: Full training run on the complete dataset. NEEDS A GPU (local CUDA or Colab) — see ml/README.md for how to launch it. fp16 is deliberately OFF: T5's softmax/layernorm activations overflow fp16 range and training diverges to NaN loss partway through — this is a known T5 issue, not specific to this dataset. On a T4 (no bf16 support) that leaves fp32, which is correct and still fits these batch sizes; train.py also refuses to start with fp16 on any t5 model as a backstop.
